inputs.text: Main thaka hua mehsoos kar raha hoon, bukhar bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever and malaise are common in viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can cause fever and malaise

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Although possible, typhoid is less likely at this stage

inputs.text: Mujhe bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard bhi hai aur kabz ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise fever and constipation are indicative of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can cause abdominal pain and constipation

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is less likely given the new symptoms

inputs.text: Ab mujhe tez bukhar ho raha hai, kabz ke baad dast ho raha hai aur mere paas bahut kam shakti hai
inputs.image_desc: pale appearance, dark circles under eyes

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The combination of high fever, diarrhea after constipation, and severe weakness is highly suggestive of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can cause diarrhea, but the overall clinical picture is more consistent with typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria is less likely given the absence of specific symptoms such as chills and rigors

inputs.text: Mujhe ab bahut thakan mehsoos ho rahi hai, bukhar bhi band nahin ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The persistence of high fever and the development of complications such as intestinal perforation are consistent with typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the absence of specific symptoms and the overall clinical picture

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the absence of specific symptoms such as chills and rigors

discriminating_symptoms: bukhar bhi band nahin ho raha hai
